log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Hadozee — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):8+1=9 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):16+1=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:1+4=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 2/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Mage awake.
ACTION: Shakes Mage awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Hadozee — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. 14 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Hadozee — Iron Concentration.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Hadozee — Iron Concentration.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:13+3=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 8casting_mod force damage. Hadozee — Iron Concentration HP: NaN/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Hadozee — Iron Concentration.
→ Hadozee — Iron Concentration: DEX save [d20:8+7=15 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
